//: Editor preset for as-str's global mode. Add it to your assembly tsconfig's `extends` array so the TS language server loads as-str's ambient typings (`str`) with no import - e.g. { "extends": ["assemblyscript/std/assembly.json", "as-str/globals.json"], "include": ["./**/*.ts"] }. Pairs with `--transform as-str/transform`, which injects the runtime import at compile time. typeRoots is re-pointed (relative to this file in node_modules/as-str) because AssemblyScript's std config sets typeRoots:["types"], which otherwise blocks resolving as-str/globals from node_modules. Assumes a hoisted node_modules (npm/yarn); for pnpm or unusual layouts, drop a copy of as-str/globals/index.d.ts into your assembly directory instead.
